strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure—exceeds 15-year requirement with demonstrated growth
Current Staff-level role building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks; shows recent alignment with AI focus
Demonstrated technical leadership through founding GISCollective, organizing engineering courses/workshops, and multiple staff positions
concerns: Limited evidence of shipped AI/ML products or platforms—current AI work appears infrastructure-focused rather than product-driven innovation
No Master's or PhD in AI; background is practical software engineering rather than formal AI/ML training (preferred qualification)
Recent transition into explicit AI work (April 2025) and pattern of 1–3 year role tenure raises questions about depth of AI expertise and strategic customer advisory capability

key_factors.factor: AI product expertise and demonstrated innovations
Technical leadership and influence through staff roles

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 15-year experience minimum and currently engages in AI-agent infrastructure work. However, the role emphasizes 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products,' and the resume lacks evidence of shipped AI/ML products or strategic customer advisory experience. Staff-level roles and open-source leadership demonstrate IC leadership capability, but the recent pivot to explicit AI work, absence of formal AI/ML training, and limited product-focused portfolio create a meaningful gap against the director-level AI strategy expectations.
